name: Beta Season I
note: Full-game content. ratingTarget and the affixCalendar assume the full 6-dungeon, 8-affix season; only Ashveil Crypts is authored so far, and the MVP restricts PLAY to Fortified + Bursting (GDD MVP scope). Affix rules locked per GDD v1.10: Tier 1 alternates Fortified/Tyrannical weekly; Tier 2 pairs never combine Bursting + Bolstering.
